case_title: NATALIE BUENO VS. EVN INVESTMENTS, LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-24-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EVN INVESTMENTS, LLC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUENO, NATALIE AS TO DEFENDANT EVN INVESTMENTS, LLC

SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER - RE: ASKING COURT FOR ORDER TO DISMISS DUE TO LACK OF JURISDICTION & 3RD CLAIM OVER $2500 BY PLAINTIFF. (FILED BY DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE - YULIYA EFIMKIN); SC-105 FILED TOO LATE FOR RESPONSE BY PLAINTIFF **RECEIVED IN OFFICE 1 DAY BEFORE NOV-17-2017 HEARING**; DOCUMENTATION FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT EVN INVESTMENTS, LLC
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SC-109: AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR NAME OF PERSON APPEARING - YULIYA EFIMKIN FILED BY DEFENDANT EVN INVESTMENTS, LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BUENO, NATALIE AS TO DEFENDANT EVN INVESTMENTS, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. TH DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR COURT ORDERS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT EVEN INVESTMENTS, LLC IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS NOT A PROPER PARTY. PLAINTIFF NATALIE BUENO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLRISE FINALCIAL GROUP, INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY YULIYA EFIMKIN, COO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/17/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
